---
title: "Generative AI in Education"
format: html
---

A repository of academic papers, opinion pieces, and popular press articles focused on the subject of Generative AI in Education. This repository is not intended to be a guidance on usage but it provides educators and the general public with evidence for the potential impact of Generative AI on university education and training.

## Academic Papers

1. Coming soon ...

## Opinion Pieces

1. Coming soon ...

## Popular Press Articles

1. Coming soon ...
